scripts.contract:deploy:sepolia: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/ignition.ts --network sepolia
scripts.contract:deploy: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/ignition.ts --network arbitrumOne --verify
scripts.contract:deploy:force: npm run contract:wipe && npm run contract:deploy
scripts.contract:verify: npx hardhat ignition --network arbitrumOne verify chain-42161
scripts.contract:verify:sepolia: npx hardhat ignition --network sepolia verify chain-11155111
